title: Kawal Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Kawal Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Telangana

overview.short: Kawal Tiger Reserve, is a nature preserve located in Jannaram mandal of Mancherial District in the Telangana state of India.
overview.description: Kawal Tiger Reserve, is a nature preserve located in Jannaram mandal of Mancherial District in the Telangana state of India. Previously, the area was part of Adilabad district. The Government of India declared Kawal Wildlife Sanctuary to be a tiger reserve in 2012. The reserve is the oldest sanctuary in the northern Telangana.

topPlaces.description: Jannaram Mandal is situated in Mancherial District of the Telangana state in South India. Jannaram is famous for Kawal Wildelife Sanctuary Tiger Reserve.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kawal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kawal Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kawal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (177 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (195 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kawal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kawal Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kawal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kawal Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kawal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jannaram mandal.
